mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_master ( product_code, channel, market, asset_type, currency, product_name, is_qdii, track_index, buy_fee_rate, sell_fee_rate, buy_confirm_offset, sell_confirm_offset, cutoff_time, data_source, is_active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productCode}, #{channel}, #{market}, #{assetType}, #{currency}, #{productName}, #{isQdii}, #{trackIndex}, #{buyFeeRate}, #{sellFeeRate}, #{buyConfirmOffset}, #{sellConfirmOffset}, #{cutoffTime}, #{dataSource}, #{isActive}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE product_master SET product_name = #{productName}, is_qdii = #{isQdii}, track_index = #{trackIndex}, buy_fee_rate = #{buyFeeRate}, sell_fee_rate = #{sellFeeRate}, buy_confirm_offset = #{buyConfirmOffset}, sell_confirm_offset = #{sellConfirmOffset}, cutoff_time = #{cutoffTime}, data_source = #{dataSource}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
